title: Thredd joins Visa's Agentic Ready programme
summary: Thredd, the AI-first issuer processing platform, today announced it has joined the Visa Agentic Ready programme, enabling issuers across Europe to participate in agent-initiated payments without rebuilding their payments infrastructure.

title: LSEG addds financial data and analytics to AI workflow automation platform

title: AI operating system Feathery raises $30 million
